cited_facts.why_it_matters: States that the SusPay amendment was replaced by the Escrow amendment, indicating it is no longer the active proposal.
Explicitly labels the status of SusPay as 'obsolete/removed', which triggers the REJECT condition for retired/obsolete proposals.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet facts explicitly state that the SusPay amendment is obsolete and was replaced by the Escrow amendment. According to the task rule, REJECT is the correct route for retired or obsolete proposals.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: Do not claim the amendment is safe to proceed or requires deep technical review, as it is obsolete.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Reject the amendment as it is obsolete and replaced.
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete SusPay Amendment
